score_formula_notes: Round 4 (2026-04-27, 妖币 regime, 松版): user trades small-cap manipulator coins, TP up to 500%, SL <=10%
primary metric is r4_keep_gate (bwe_loop_score_v2.py): mean + 0.5*(top_p20_mean - mean) with mdd<=50% AND win_rate>=20% gates, else -1e6
mean_net_pct is the core (NOT median) — fat-right-tail means median often negative even for winning archetypes
right_tail_lift rewards archetypes that occasionally catch big manipulator pumps (top 20% mean lifted vs overall mean)
All four gate parameters intentionally LOOSE per user request 2026-04-27: mdd_thresh 50%, win_rate 20%, right_tail q 20%, weight 0.5
OBSOLETE: Round 1-3 SL/TP > 4 reject rule REPEALED — absolute values matter in 妖币 regime, ratio does not
